module:
Integration tests for cross-backend consistency.

These tests ensure that different vector backends produce
consistent and comparable results for the same operations.

test_vectors.docstring: Generate consistent test vectors for cross-backend tests.

test_cross_backend_consistency.docstring: Test that operations have consistent behavior across backends.

test_similarity_metric_consistency.docstring: Test consistency of similarity metrics across backends.

test_vector_format_consistency.docstring: Test consistency with different vector format inputs.

test_empty_collection_handling.docstring: Test consistency in handling empty collections.

test_dimension_handling.docstring: Test consistent handling of vector dimensions across backends.
